ddls:
CREATE TABLE "mentions" (
  "mention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mention */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source of the mention */,
  "person_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the person being mentioned */,
  "mentions_count" INTEGER /* Number of mentions for the source/person combination */,
  "tone_avg" REAL /* Average sentiment tone for the mentions */,
  "tone_std" REAL /* Standard deviation of sentiment tone for the mentions */,
  "mention_text" TEXT /* The actual text of the mention */,
  "mention_url" TEXT /* URL linking to the original mention */,
  "mention_type" TEXT /* Type of mention (e.g., post, comment, share) */,
  "engagement_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes, shares, and comments on the mention */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the mention if available */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the mention */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Whether the source of the mention is verified */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mention was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mentions_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mentions_person_id FOREIGN KEY ("person_id") REFERENCES persons ("person_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "platform" INTEGER /* Social media platform the source belongs to */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source (e.g., personal account, brand account) */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the source has */,
  "engagement_rate" REAL /* Average engagement rate of the source */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Whether the source is verified */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the source was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sources_platform FOREIGN KEY ("platform") REFERENCES platforms ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "persons" (
  "person_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each person */,
  "person_name" TEXT /* Name of the person */,
  "category" INTEGER /* Category of the person (e.g., public figure, brand) */,
  "person_url" TEXT /* URL linking to the person's profile */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography or description of the person */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the person has */,
  "engagement_rate" REAL /* Average engagement rate of the person */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Whether the person is verified */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the person was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the person's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("person_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_persons_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis */,
  "mention_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mention being analyzed */,
  "tone" REAL /* Sentiment tone of the mention */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the sentiment analysis */,
  "polarity" TEXT /* Sentiment polarity (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "subjectivity" REAL /* Subjectivity score of the sentiment */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the sentiment analysis */,
  "source_text" TEXT /* The actual text of the source of the sentiment */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL linking to the source of the sentiment */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the source (e.g., post, comment, share) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_mention_id FOREIGN KEY ("mention_id") REFERENCES mentions ("mention_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the social media platform */,
  "platform_url" TEXT /* URL of the platform */,
  "platform_type" TEXT /* Type of platform (e.g., microblogging, social networking) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the platform was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the platform information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mentions_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data entry */,
  "mention_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mention */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the historical data */,
  "mentions_count" INTEGER /* Number of mentions on the given date */,
  "engagement_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes, shares, and comments on the mention on the given date */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the mention on the given date */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the mention on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mentions_history_mention_id FOREIGN KEY ("mention_id") REFERENCES mentions ("mention_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data entry */,
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sentiment analysis */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the historical data */,
  "tone" REAL /* Sentiment tone on the given date */,
  "polarity" TEXT /* Sentiment polarity on the given date */,
  "subjectivity" REAL /* Subjectivity score of the sentiment on the given date */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the sentiment analysis on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_history_sentiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("sentiment_id") REFERENCES sentiment ("sentiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" INTEGER /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, marketing professional, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account information was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Whether the report is private or public */,
  "views_count" INTEGER /* Number of views the report has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report detail */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the report */,
  "mention_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mention included in the report */,
  "tone" REAL /* Sentiment tone of the mention */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the sentiment analysis */,
  "source_text" TEXT /* The actual text of the source of the mention */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL linking to the source of the mention */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the source (e.g., post, comment, share) */,
  "engagement_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes, shares, and comments on the mention */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the mention */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the mention */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_details_mention_id FOREIGN KEY ("mention_id") REFERENCES mentions ("mention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_details_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the report */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used to access the report */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Whether the access attempt was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_permissions FOREIGN KEY ("permissions") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role-permission association */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role-permission association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role-permission association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
